chapter_title.en: Refutation of Kaisaniya belief and account of the demise of Muhammad bin Hanfiyyah

text: وما جرى بين محمد بن الحنفية وعلي بن الحسين عليه السلام ومحاكمتهما إلى الحجر معروف لا نطول بذكره هاهنا.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: There is also the incident, which occurred between Imam Sajjad (a.s) and Muhammad bin Hanafiyya; that they sought judgment from Hajar Aswad, as we mentioned before, and thus we would not prolong the book by repeating it.
